mainHtml:
ABOUT PROMAKEHUB

Connecting engineering requirements with stable manufacturing delivery

ProMakeHub focuses on precision manufacturing services and provides reliable manufacturing collaboration for R&D, procurement and supply chain teams through digital quotation, engineering review and quality closed loop.

280+Manufacturing and testing equipment
99.8%On-time delivery rate

How we support projects

From early solution judgment to batch delivery, the team collaborates around transparent progress, stable quality and engineering feedback.

Project pre-productionIdentify material, construction, tolerance and Surface Finishing risks ahead of time.
Transparent processPrecipitate traceable records around quotation, production scheduling, testing and delivery nodes.
Quality closed loopProvide first article, size, appearance and quality documentation support according to project requirements.
COMPANY PROFILE

Clear entry point from enterprise capabilities to collaboration processes

Here, the company's positioning, manufacturing capabilities and collaboration methods are presented in a centralized manner, and the team, equipment, quality and delivery system are expanded through the company introduction page to help customers quickly judge the degree of cooperation compatibility.

View company profile
280+Manufacturing and testing equipment
30+Covering materials and post-processing types
7x24Quotation and project response mechanism
ISOQuality process and data closed loop
QUALITY SYSTEM

Delivery-oriented quality system

Quality is not the last inspection, but a continuous action from demand identification, process evaluation, production process to data delivery.

FAIFirst article confirmationCMMDimensional inspectionDFMManufacturability recommendationsTraceprocess record

Support

Provide support portals around engineering, orders and long-term cooperation, allowing R&D, procurement and supply chain teams to quickly find ways to communicate.

Engineering support

Drawing review, process suggestions, material substitution and structural optimization feedback.

Order support

Quotation confirmation, production scheduling communication, logistics status and delivery data compilation.

Partnership Support

Long-term projects, bulk repurchase and supply chain capability synergy.

Collaboration

Customers can clearly understand the key rhythms from requirement confirmation, engineering review to delivery review before cooperation.

01

Project start

Confirm part usage, drawing model, quantity stage and quality documentation requirements.

02

Project review

Combine materials, construction, tolerances and post-processing to form manufacturing recommendations.

03

Delivery Review

Organize inspection records, problem closures and process information that can be repurchased.

Need to know more about how to cooperate?

Tell us the project stage, part type and expected delivery pace, and we will give you a more appropriate communication path.

Contact Us
